javadoc_before:
/** * Create a new ArrayRealVector using the input array as the underlying * data array. *

If an array is built specially in order to be embedded in a * ArrayRealVector and not used directly, the copyArray may be * set to false * @param d data for new vector * @param copyArray if true, the input array will be copied, otherwise * it will be referenced * @throws IllegalArgumentException if d is empty * @throws NullPointerException if d is null * @see #ArrayRealVector(double[]) */
javadoc_after:
